app.name: Onetime Secret
app.short_description: Share sensitive information through self-destructing links.
app.long_description:
The official Onetime Secret app for Zendesk Support. Create encrypted, self-destructing links to share passwords, credentials, and other sensitive data with customers directly from your ticket workspace.

Secrets are encrypted at rest, viewable exactly once, then permanently deleted. Supports all Onetime Secret regions (US, EU, CA, UK, NZ) and custom domains for branded sharing links.
app.installation_instructions:
1. Sign in to your Onetime Secret account at your chosen region (e.g. us.onetimesecret.com).
2. Navigate to your account page and generate an API key.
3. Enter your account email as the API Username.
4. Paste your API key into the API Key field.
5. Select your region (us, eu, ca, uk, or nz). Defaults to us if left blank.
6. Optionally enter your custom domain if you have one configured.

apiUsername.label: API Username
apiUsername.helpText: Your Onetime Secret account identifier or email address.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.helpText: Your Onetime Secret API key. Found on your account page.

region.label: Region
region.helpText: Enter one of: eu, ca, uk, nz, us. Must match the region where your account was created. Your API key only works on that region.

defaultTTL.label: Default Expiry
defaultTTL.helpText: Default link expiry in seconds. 300 = 5 min, 3600 = 1 hour, 86400 = 1 day, 259200 = 3 days, 604800 = 7 days, 1209600 = 14 days, 2592000 = 30 days. Agents can override per secret.

customDomain.label: Custom Domain
customDomain.helpText: Your custom domain for branded links (e.g. secrets.yourcompany.com). Leave blank to use the default regional domain.

sidebar.title: Share a Secret
sidebar.secretRequired: Please enter the content you want to share.
sidebar.connectionError: Could not reach the Onetime Secret API. Check your settings.
sidebar.authError: Authentication failed. Check your API username and key.
sidebar.passphraseNote: The recipient will need the passphrase to view this secret.
